name: HRT_PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_VL
query: SELECT PREI.PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_ID PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_ID, PREI.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, PREI.PROFILE_ID PROFILE_ID, PREIT.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, PREIT.RESPONSIBILITIES RESPONSIBILITIES, PREIT.QUALIFICATIONS QUALIFICATIONS, PREIT.COMMENTS COMMENTS, PREI.JOB_LEVEL_CODE JOB_LEVEL_CODE, PREI.RISK_CODE RISK_CODE, PREI.CRITICALITY_REASON CRITICALITY_REASON, PREI.SUCCESSION_PLAN_REQUIRED SUCCESSION_PLAN_REQUIRED, PREI.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PREI.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, PREI.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, PREI.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, PREI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PREI.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_B PREI, HRT_PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_TL PREIT WHERE PREI.PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_ID = PREIT.PROFILE_EXTRA_INFO_ID AND PREIT.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
